focus_area: Issue #38 shipped: PR #42 (/review UI) squash-merged as 8b7977b (2026-04-23T04:35Z). First user-facing surface on the SRS pipeline — Server Component reads srs_cards via RLS, Client Component owns reveal/next-card state, plain-text rendering only (no dangerouslySetInnerHTML), ErrorBoundary contains client crashes, PII-safe error logging end-to-end (errorName/code/user_id only, never message). Council impl-diff verdict: 10/10/9/10/10/10. The ingest → flashcards → review loop is now end-to-end visible. Next session's highest-leverage target: issue #39 (semantic chunking — unblocks wiki-linking + gap-analysis + supersedes the MAX_BODY_CHARS stopgap from PR #37) OR FSRS scoring + review_history writes (the natural follow-up to #38).
